label_rule: State labels are boundary-forward from metadata annotations, adjusted only where pane text is indistinguishable or already visibly settled because adapter.is_idle receives text only.
notes: Derived from metadata annotations. Frame 65 already has idle-visible pane text (completion marker plus live prompt and no esc-to-interrupt), so the executable text-only label starts awaiting_input there; frame 66 is the human-noted settled idle frame.
